name: Apple Cider Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
In a large mixing bowl, cream sugar and butter. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Stir together all dry ingredients; set aside. Combine cider and vanilla.
Add dry ingredients alternately with cider mixture to batter. Mix until well blended.
Pour into a greased 10-inch angel food cake pan or fluted tube pan.
Bake at 325 degrees F for about 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until done.
Meanwhile, combine all icing ingredients in a saucepan. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
While the cake is warm, drizzle one-third of the icing over it. Serve remaining icing over individual cake servings, if desired.
